_comment_source: Derived from .correctless/artifacts/workflow-state-feature-prune-scan-slug-aware-matching-b64929.json at commit 82de3a5bb990e1b4b5d235ae29d860b47e1427ab. This is the AP-031 real-fixture for INV-004 task-slug derivation tests. Renamed away from workflow-state-*.json to avoid the workflow-gate.sh PreToolUse hook intercepting test fixture writes. Tests copy this file to a workflow-state-*.json filename inside a tmpdir before running the scanner. DO NOT edit without re-deriving from a real local workflow-state-feature-*.json artifact produced by scripts/wf/utility.sh.
